DocumentationSubject.Summary: `meta-datavault-raw` creates sanctioned raw Data Vault workspaces for modeling source-oriented Data Vault structures.
Required. Directory where the empty MetaRawDataVault workspace will be created.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Add a raw hub key part.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Add a raw hub satellite attribute.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Add a participating hub to a raw link.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Add a raw link satellite attribute.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Add a source field datatype detail.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Add a source table relationship field.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
